prediction.reasoning: The prediction for PG in 18 days is based on historical price data, incorporating an estimated average daily drift and volatility characteristic of a stable, large-cap consumer staples company. A Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model was applied, utilizing an annualized volatility assumption of approximately 18-20% and a slight positive historical drift. The point estimate reflects this expected drift, while the confidence intervals are derived from the calculated standard deviation of log returns over the 18-day period, assuming a log-normal distribution for future prices.
